column1: # Trial: GP 2: Afghan Stars vs Dallas Cyclones - Eliminator - GPCC Cup 2025

column3: GP 2: Afghan Stars vs Dallas Cyclones - Eliminator - GPCC Cup 2025 | Played on: 2025-01-18 at Grand Prairie Cricket Ground

We like to thank: | All Stars Cricket Academy for volunteering to make sample bail safety devices for trials | Grand Prairie Cricket Club (GPCC) for conducting the tournament + allowing this trial in a live match + great camera footage | Umpires and players of the 2 teams for their participation and valuable feedback on behavior of the device during the match

column2: 4:03:32 # Shy at the stumps from long off/on. not out

column1: # KEY EVENT: bail disconnects from tether

column3: Next video is a great data point | Runout attempt by keeper | One bail detaches from device while other is fine | Probable causes: | 1. Knot tying thread to O-ring got loose (most likely) | 2. O-ring got cut (unlikely) | Investigate better knots and O-ring material and discuss incident with umpires/players involved

column2: 4:04:38 # Shy at stump from keeper not out

column3: Next video is a runout attempt at bowler's end | Watch how low fielder crouches to collect the ball thrown at him | Normal situation in cricket; but dangerous w.r.t flying bails

column2: 4:09:18 # Collection at bowler end runout attempt not out
